content:
- [Commit & push in phases](commit-push-in-phases.md) — incremental commits/pushes per logical unit, not one big batch
- [Project renamed to rufflo](project-renamed-to-rufflo.md) — repo JannieP/rufflo, npm @rufflo/rufflo, .rufflo dir; ruvnet URLs + env vars preserved

Commit and push in phases — break work into small, self-contained commits and push each as you go, rather than accumulating everything into one large commit/push at the end.

**Why:** Incremental commits keep `main` (or the branch) continuously in a known-good state, make each change independently reviewable/revertible, and surface integration problems early instead of all at once.

**How to apply:** After each logically-complete unit (one fix, one feature move, one refactor) — build/test it, then `git commit` + `git push` that phase before starting the next. For larger features use a branch + PR per phase (see the established JannieP/rufflo workflow); for small post-merge fixes, commit + push directly to `main` per fix. Don't batch unrelated changes into a single commit.

This project was renamed (clean break, 2026-06) from `ruflo` / `claude-flow` to **`rufflo`**. Apply consistently:

- **Repo / git remote:** `git@github.com:JannieP/rufflo.git` (origin). NOT ruvnet/ruflo.
- **Canonical npm package:** `rufflo` (the repo-root package). The old `ruflo/` wrapper was retired to name `rufflo-bridge` + `private: true` to resolve the collision.
- **npm scope:** `@rufflo/*` (e.g. `@rufflo/cli`). Source dirs moved `v3/@claude-flow/` → `v3/@rufflo/`.
- **CLI binary / commands:** `rufflo` (e.g. `npx -y rufflo mcp start`). Storage dir `.claude-flow/` → `.rufflo/` (one-time auto-migration on first run lives in `v3/@rufflo/cli/src/storage-migration.ts`).
- **Preserved deliberately (do NOT rewrite):** upstream attribution URLs `github.com/ruvnet/claude-flow` and `ruvnet/ruflo`, and env vars (`CLAUDE_FLOW_*`, `RUFLO_*` — left as-is to avoid breaking existing shells).

See [[commit-push-in-phases]] for the working style on this repo.

- [ruvnet deps forked & renamed](ruvnet-deps-forked-and-renamed.md) — 24 forks (@rufvector/* + vendored rufvector/agentdb/agentic-flow), ruv→ruf, file:-linked, ~475 tests green

**Why:** Incremental commits keep `main` (or the branch) continuously in a known-good state, make each change independently reviewable/revertible, and surface integration problems early instead of all at once.

See [[commit-push-in-phases]] for the working style on this repo.

The user asked to fork every `github.com/ruvnet` lib dependency into this repo, rename `ruv`→`ruf`, and link the fork as the new dependency (also `CLAUDE_FLOW_*`→`RUFFLO_*` env vars, db default → `vector.db`). Done and green.

**Naming convention (literal):** `@ruvector/*`→`@rufvector/*`, `ruvector`→`rufvector`, `ruvllm`→`rufllm` (so `@ruvector/ruvllm`→`@rufvector/rufllm`, `ruvllm-wasm`→`rufllm-wasm`), `ruvector-X` crates→`rufvector-X`. **PRESERVE** `github.com/ruvnet` org URLs (280 files) + author `ruv@ruv.net` (11 files) — those are NOT renamed.

**24 forks, all load + smoke-tested:**
- 21 under `v3/@rufvector/`: core, sona, router, attention, diskann, tiny-dancer, rvf-node, rufllm (native/hybrid); gnn, graph-node, graph-transformer; rufllm-wasm, rvagent-wasm, learning-wasm, wasm, rabitq-wasm, attention-wasm, exotic-wasm (WASM); rvf, rvf-wasm, rvf-solver (rvf family).
- 3 vendored (name kept, internals swept) under `v3/vendor/`: `rufvector` (bare ruvector), `agentdb`, `agentic-flow`.
- Native `.node` forks rebuilt from renamed crates in `v3/crates/rufvector/` + `v3/crates/ruvllm-fork/` (need `build.rs` + `napi-build` + MSRV ≥1.77). WASM forks = prebuilt `npm pack` + package-name rename (compiled glue/ABI kept — same as not rewriting `.node` binaries).
- `rufllm` is CJS-only: rufflo loads it via `requireCjs`, its smoke test uses `createRequire` (ESM `import()` fails on extensionless imports).

**Wiring:** every dep is a `file:` ref to the fork; `node_modules/@rufvector/*` + `node_modules/{rufvector,agentdb,agentic-flow}` symlinked. All deps optional in rufflo (`await import().catch(()=>null)` / `safeImport`), so forks are functional upgrades (e.g. vendored rufvector gives real ONNX embeddings where before it was a mock — this broke a test that mocked `'ruvector'`; fix = mock `'rufvector'`).

**Intentionally NOT renamed:** docs/CHANGELOG (historical lineage), signed `verification/*/manifest.md.json` (editing breaks signatures — regen via witness pipeline), lockfiles (regen on install). Unpublished-upstream optionals (`@ruvector/diff|coverage|ast|dag-wasm|hyperbolic-hnsw-wasm|micro-hnsw-wasm|sparse-inference-wasm|cognitum-gate-kernel`, and the empty/broken `gnn-wasm@0.1.0`) → renamed to `@rufvector/*` in `optionalDependencies` only (no fork; they never resolved upstream either).

**Verify commands:** `git grep -lE '@ruvector/' -- 'v3/**/*.ts' '**package.json'` (must be 0 in functional code); regression gate = `cd v3/@rufflo/cli && npx vitest run __tests__/memory-ruvector-deep.test.ts __tests__/sona-embeddings-validation.test.ts __tests__/ruvector/` (~475 pass). See also [[project-renamed-to-rufflo]].

**Post-rename gotchas (all fixed; all 16 @rufflo suites green — ~7000 tests):**
1. **Stale compiled dist** — a source-wide rename (env vars / imports / `vector.db`) updates `src/` but NOT `dist/`. Packages consumed via subpath imports (`@rufflo/cli-core/mcp-tools/types` → resolves to `dist/src/...`) load STALE compiled code at test AND runtime. Fix: rebuild every affected package (`cd v3/@rufflo/<pkg> && npm run build`). Detect: `grep -rlE 'CLAUDE_FLOW_|@ruvector/|ruvector\.db' v3/@rufflo/*/dist`. This bit `getProjectCwd()` (reads `RUFFLO_CWD`; stale dist read `CLAUDE_FLOW_CWD`) → task-dispatcher + worker-daemon tests failed until rebuild.
2. **Generated/committed artifacts** — `.claude/helpers/statusline.cjs` has a byte-identical drift guard vs `generateStatuslineScript(DEFAULT_INIT_OPTIONS)`; regenerate it after touching the generator's env-var names.
3. **sql.js wasm resolution** — `fts5.test.ts` used `require.resolve('sql.js/package.json')`, which throws on sql.js ≥1.14 (its `exports` map blocks `./package.json`). Fix: resolve `sql.js/dist/sql-wasm.wasm` (or `sql.js` main + sibling) directly. Unrelated to the rename but surfaced by the full-suite sweep.
4. **Plugin bridges adopt-truthy of now-resolvable forks** — plugin bridges do `import('@rufvector/X').catch(()=>null); if (mod) this._module = mod; else mock`. Once forked, `@rufvector/{sona,attention-wasm,exotic-wasm}` RESOLVE (upstream `@ruvector/*` never did), so a bare truthiness check swaps in a real module whose native API differs from the bridge's expected methods → `TypeError: X is not a function`. Fix: guard adoption on a signature method (`typeof mod.flashAttention === 'function'`, etc.). This was a real regression in `neural-coordination` (fixed → 105 pass) and *improved* `cognitive-kernel` 20→5 (real `@rufvector/sona` beats the mock).

**Out-of-scope / deferred (NOT rename regressions — confirmed pre-existing via `git stash` baseline):**
- `cognitive-kernel` (5) + `quantum-optimizer` (10) failing tests are pre-existing domain-plugin bugs (LoRA/Fisher/annealing, Zod enum tests); the rename introduced ZERO net-new failures.
- The `@rufflo/ruvector-upstream` plugin (dir + name starts with "ruv") is a rufflo-internal WASM-bridge stub, NOT a ruvnet dep; nothing imports it in code (comments only), its lockfiles still carry the pre-rename `@claude-flow/ruvector-upstream`. Left as-is — renaming it buys nothing functional and wades into pre-existing dep-decl inconsistency.
